title.en: It didn't take long for the disciples of the Te...

content.en:
It didn't take long for the disciples of the Ten Elements Ancestor to return.

Of course, not all the disciples returned, and some were unable to come back for the time being, but an incarnation was also sent to participate in the Ten Elements Ancestor's discipleship ceremony.

Therefore, this can be regarded as gathering all the disciples.

Of course, a registered disciple like the half-tooth master is not qualified to enter Wanyuan Mountain.

There were only five personal disciples and thirty-three official disciples who could really enter Wanyuan Mountain.

this day.

The Ten Elements Ancestor officially held a ceremony to accept disciples, and one by one the personal disciples and official disciples were present.

At the apprenticeship ceremony, the ancestors of the Ten Elements announced some rules, and then there were some processes such as tea worship and worship, which was not very complicated.

After that, the Ten Elements Ancestor officially declared Ye Tian his fifth personal disciple.

Then, it was to introduce other disciples to Ye Tian.

At the apprenticeship ceremony, Ye Tian met several senior brothers and other junior disciples.

Senior brother Jiang You, second senior brother Gu Mo, third senior brother Black Decay, and fourth senior sister Snow Girl.

Among them, the most powerful is the third senior brother Black Decay, followed by the ancient demon, followed by the Snow Girl, and the senior brother Jiang You is the weakest.

However, this weakness is also relatively speaking, compared to other formal disciples, Senior Brother is still very strong.

In addition, the senior brother is the first personal disciple of the Ten Elements Ancestor, and his status is still very high, and everyone respects him very much.

Subsequently, Ye Tian chatted with these senior brothers for a while, and they knew each other.

"Fifth Senior Brother, if you have time in the future, you can come to our dojo to gather. "

Before leaving, several senior brothers and sisters said.

"Definitely!"

Ye Tianying said.

It didn't take long for Wanyuan Mountain to become deserted again.

And Ye Tian did not leave Wanyuan Mountain, he was ready to stay in Wanyuan Mountain for a few more days.

There is a library in Wanyuan Mountain, and the classics in it are of great help to the Eternal Controller, and naturally it is also of great help to him, so he will often browse the classics in it to increase his knowledge and heritage.

If he hadn't become a personal disciple of the Ten Elements Ancestor, he wouldn't have had such treatment.

Of course, there are many advantages to becoming a disciple of the Ten Elements Ancestor, such as being able to consult the Ten Elements Ancestor at any time and listen to the Ten Elements Ancestor's sermons.

Moreover, he can also obtain a weapon of the Upper Rank Master.

The value of the Realm Keeper is very high, and his Hundred Realm Stick is just the top subordinate Realm Keeper.

this day.

The Ten Elements Ancestor came to inform Ye Tian that the high-level control realm soldier he wanted had been refined.

This high-level control realm soldier was refined according to Ye Tian's requirements, it was a realm-type control realm soldier, which could accommodate three thousand daos, creating an incomparably terrifying realm and suppressing the powerful eternal master.

"This high-level control realm soldier is called a domain disk, you take it and refine it, it can greatly increase your strength. However, to fully exert its power, you still have to wait until you step into the realm of the Eternal Master. Ten Xingzu said.

"Thank you, Master!"

Ye Tian thanked.

At this time, the Ten Elements Ancestor said again: "Bring the Hundred Realms Stick." "

Ye Tian took out the Hundred Realms Stick and handed it to the Ten Elements Ancestor.

The Ten Elements Ancestor took it and refined it a little, and quickly handed it over to Ye Tian.

"I've added a few materials and rerefined it, and it's now a mid-level realm master!"

Ye Tian held the Hundred Realms Stick again, and suddenly felt the power of the Hundred Realms Stick that was even more powerful than before.

"Thank you, Master!" Ye Tian said excitedly.

Subsequently, the Ten Elements Ancestor proposed, "Your current will is in the late stage of the Eighth Order, you can go to the Heavenly Dragon Soul Tree in Wanyuan Mountain to cultivate for a period of time, it should be enough to raise your will to the peak realm of the Eighth Order." As for the ninth-order will, it is very difficult to step into it, and when you step into the realm of the Eternal Controller, you will be given another opportunity for the teacher. "

"Yes!"

Ye Tianying said.

Subsequently, he said goodbye and came to the Heavenly Dragon Soul Tree in Wanyuan Mountain.

At this time.

Several formal disciples were cultivating here, and when they saw Ye Tian, they said respectfully, "I've seen Senior Brother Ye!"

"Well, you can cultivate, leave me alone. "

Ye Tiandao.

Subsequently, he found a place and began his practice here as well.

Airplanes!!!

The Heavenly Dragon Soul Tree released a strange energy, refining Ye Tian's will in a very gentle way, compressing his will.

In such a situation, his will quickly increased.

At this rate, at most, in tens of thousands of realm river years, he would be able to raise his will to the peak realm of the eighth order.

However, after reaching the peak realm of the eighth order, although the Heavenly Dragon Soul Tree is still important, it is too difficult to rely on the Heavenly Dragon Soul Tree to raise the will to the ninth order.

The other side.

Void Zone.

Ye Tian sent a copy body to prepare for the Black Silent Sea outside the Void Region.

This Silent Sea has been attached to the Void for an infinite number of years, and the Eternal Masters cannot destroy it, so they simply ignore it.

But on this day, Ye Tian was going to attack it.

Inside the Silent Sea.

Ye Tian stepped in, and at this time, there were still a few half-step Eternal Master-level Boundary River Beings in the Black Silence Sea, and they sensed Ye Tian's arrival, and immediately wanted to expel Ye Tian.

"Die!"

Ye Tian stretched out the Hundred Realms Stick and shook it casually.

Bang bang bang!!

The life of the head of the Boundary River was blown up by Ye Tian, turning into corpses and floating in the black sea.

At this point, there is no boundary river life to bother him.

Black Silent Sea Center.

Ye Tian sat here cross-legged, his purpose here was to swallow the Black Silent Sea.

If the other Eternal Controllers heard that Ye Tian, a half-step Eternal Master, was going to swallow the Black Silent Sea, they would definitely not believe it, thinking that Ye Tian was bragging, but he could indeed do it.

The life-devouring technique he created can swallow powerful life into his body and occupy all the abilities of the opponent.

Of course, there is also a limit to the Soul Swallowing Technique, and the Life Swallowing Technique he created can only devour three lives at most, and if there are more, it will not work, which is the limitation of the Soul Swallowing Technique.

In other words, Lifedevouring can only be cast three times.

But this secret technique is too rebellious, and even the Ten Elements Ancestors have praised this secret technique, which shows how awesome it is.

"Then start devouring the Black Silent Sea, once the devouring is successful, I will undergo earth-shaking changes, completely surpass my previous self, and then I will be able to be promoted to the eternal master with the most terrifying background. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

"Life-Swallowing!"

As Ye Tian cast the Life Devouring Technique, the Black Silent Sea was swallowed by Ye Tian little by little.

It was as if he had turned into a pole, and the Sea of Silence was flowing backwards into the pole.

At the beginning, Ye Tian's speed of devouring the Black Silent Sea was still very slow, but as time passed, the speed of devouring became faster and faster, and if you observed it from a distance, the Black Silent Sea was shrinking.

And this kind of movement naturally attracted the attention of the eternal masters of the Void Region.
